payload.answer: Cannot safely assign the preference 'likes early Coltrane' to either existing Sam without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new message refers only to 'Sam' and there are two existing person entities named Sam: Sam from Goldman and Sam from Point72. There is insufficient context to determine which Sam likes early Coltrane.

details: Detected two candidate entities with the same given name.
Rejected durable memory commit because entity resolution is ambiguous.

repair_options: Ask the user whether they mean Sam from Goldman or Sam from Point72.
If the user clarifies, store the preference on the specified Sam entity.
